title: Podiatrists
description: Diagnose and treat diseases and deformities of the human foot.

tasks.text: Treat bone, muscle, and joint disorders affecting the feet and ankles.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Diagnose diseases and deformities of the foot using medical histories, physical examinations, x-rays, and laboratory test results.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise patients about treatments and foot care techniques necessary for prevention of future problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prescribe medications, corrective devices, physical therapy, or surgery.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Surgically treat conditions such as corns, calluses, ingrown nails, tumors, shortened tendons, bunions, cysts, or abscesses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Refer patients to physicians when symptoms indicative of systemic disorders, such as arthritis or diabetes, are observed in feet and legs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Correct deformities by means of plaster casts and strapping.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform administrative duties, such as hiring employees, ordering supplies, or keeping records.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Educate the public about the benefits of foot care through techniques such as speaking engagements, advertising, and other forums.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Treat deformities using mechanical methods, such as whirlpool or paraffin baths, and electrical methods, such as short wave and low voltage currents.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
